                           Company Note:       to mud. Had to pull several stuck trucks up the hill, stop traffic, and scrape mud off road. Later in the day

                           Company Note:       delay.                            Company Note:       to mud. Had to pull several stuck trucks up the hill, stop traffic, and scrape mud off road. Later in the day

Back tires in the air when bucket is full.                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                
                           Inspector Note:

                                               cost us some loads when we had to quit loading side dumps to load the artic trucks.                              
                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                
                                               182 truck hours                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                
                           Inspector Note:
